speaker: MATT
raw_text: You may. I'm giving you all one round preparation before we roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe amble more than dash.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, not dash, just walk in a way that he could be easily shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Interesting point of order, you're not too certain of the gender of this individual, kind of fluid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, great, that long-haired guard individual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. As the figure leaps over the wall and begins making a run towards the center area, about four different arrows pass through its form before one of these gnoll creatures goes lumbering forward and slashes out to it. This gnoll, interestingly enough-- the other ones you see and the one you saw before the city are all built and muscular. This one seems to be porous. With a brief bit of view, you can see there's clumps of fur and exposed bone and part of its skull is just pushing out of its snout with teeth gnashing. As it tears into the illusion, it claws through, confused, and looks over in your direction. As you're finishing drawing your blade across your back, what normally would be cold energy suddenly flickers into this beacon of bright white light.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Something clicks in your mind and you're like, "Oh, I know you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm preparing. How close am I to this thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This entity would be here now. It would have just left out into that section there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Does it see us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It does now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use Vicious Mockery at it, really quickly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I invoke Duplicity?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you all now to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is that one of the were-thingies? Damn!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That ear is mine!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so Beau, what are you doing? You all have one round of prep. Right now, you've gone--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I cast a spell. Can I also move?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can move, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As soon as the arrows flew by, I'm going to dash across the alley.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to send my duplicate after her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You're running that way?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep. As far as I can go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. And you send your duplicate over there as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. And Beau?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm also going to use my speed to dash across. I can move 40. Can I peek into this window and see if I can see anything in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Easy to see in this perspective. You glance inside--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stealthily?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you glance inside, you can just barely see around the corner. The place is tossed. It is shattered and ruined. It looks like it was once the interior of a small tavern of some kind, but the kitchen is wrecked and you can see two of these gnolls are in the process of grabbing large sacks out of the kitchen and pulling them out through the front door on the opposite side of the building.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Okay. I turn to Nott. I go--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Look at two unicorns inside?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The gnolls!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're inside the--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shh.
